code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(text)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(text, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 10
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      count = count
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if n > 0
    match string.byte_at(text, n - 1)
    when Some(b)
      if b != 10
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      count = count
    end
  end
  println("lines=#{count}")
end
